channel.title: Laws on Zahkthar
channel.description: Recent content in Laws on Zahkthar

item.title: The fundamental laws of steady-state
item.description: The main laws you need to know to go further in electronics. Before you can really do electronics, i.e. read schematics, program microcontrollers, discover new components or even design/build your own circuits, you need to have a minimum of basics! So that’s what I’m aiming to do in this series of articles: recap the basics that are essential if you want to pursue electronics. I therefore recommend that you read this series first if you’re new to electronics, which will then allow you to specialise a little more in the subject that interests you.
